name: Squad 404 is tasked to “babysit” you
description:
“I’m watching you… falls asleep”

After the duo of DEFY and the entire AR Team, it finally has come down to the black ops Squad 404 to watch over your ass. Again like the last bot in the trilogy, its linked in lore.

Ok, it’s time to “technically” finish the trilogy. I say “technically” because the first one in the series (AK12 and AN94) isn’t a full squad bot. But hey, if you want a full DEFY bot to watch over you, then sure just ask me. Anyways no more yapping, have a good day and enjoy.

Art by moorina (Pixiv)
creator: Pausdbutoon
